prompt: Give me a high-level overview of the Trello API surface from the trello-openapi.json file. How many endpoints are there? What are the main resource groups? What authentication method does it use? What are the most complex schemas?

assertions.text: Reports a total endpoint count in the ballpark of 180-200
Provides a breakdown by HTTP method (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE)
Identifies at least 8 distinct resource groups (boards, cards, members, lists, etc.)
Correctly identifies authentication as API key + token query parameters
Identifies at least 3 complex schemas with details about their properties
Overview is well-organized with clear sections, not a raw data dump
